design.brief_summary: Four-slot 32-bit store/load command processor with automatic work-register load.

requirements.title: store 32-bit data into addressed slot
requirements.description: The block writes store_data_i into the slot selected by store_addr_i when store_valid_i is asserted.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each asserted store_valid_i updates the addressed slot and marks it valid for later load.

requirements.title: implement four-slot addressed storage
requirements.description: The storage array provides four 32-bit flip-flop slots addressed by store_addr_i[1:0].
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All STORE operations resolve to one of four addressed 32-bit slots.

requirements.title: auto-load lowest valid slot into work register
requirements.description: When at least one slot is valid and downstream_ready_i is high, the block loads the lowest-address valid slot into the WORK register.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: With stored data present and downstream_ready_i high, the next accepted work output corresponds to the lowest-address valid slot.

requirements.title: clear loaded slot validity
requirements.description: A successful load clears the selected slot valid bit so the same entry is not loaded again.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: After a load from address A, that slot is not eligible for another load until a new STORE rewrites address A.

requirements.title: clear state on reset
requirements.description: Reset clears storage validity and empties the WORK register interface state.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: After reset, all slot valid bits are zero, work_data_o is zero, and work_valid_o is low.

diagrams.title: store to work-register datapath
diagrams.content: blockdiag { store_if -> slot_array -> load_selector -> work_reg -> downstream_if; }

source_files.content: module load_store_command_processor (input logic clk_i, input logic rst_n, input logic store_valid_i, input logic [1:0] store_addr_i, input logic [31:0] store_data_i, input logic downstream_ready_i, output logic [31:0] work_data_o, output logic work_valid_o); endmodule

rtl_modules.name: load_store_command_processor
rtl_modules.description: Single-clock command processor with addressed store array and auto-load work register.

downstream_handoff.notes: Use the microarchitecture spec as the design-intent brief for the downstream DV planning flow.
